description: Master formulary URL registry — single source of truth for all formulary data sources across 50 states + DC. Used for annual refresh: copy file, increment year, HEAD-check URLs, re-fetch, re-parse.
annual_refresh_process: 2. Replace '2026' with '2027' in all formulary_url fields (crude first pass)
3. Run HEAD requests on every URL to check for 404s
4. Fix broken URLs — check carrier websites for updated paths
5. Check CMS QHP PUF for new market entrants per state
6. Compare carrier lists year-over-year for market exits
7. Re-fetch and re-parse all PDFs and JSON endpoints
8. Update drugs_parsed counts from parsed output files

carriers.formulary_url: CMS Machine-Readable PUF → carrier index.json → drugs.json
carriers.year_pattern: CMS publishes new MR-PUF October-November each year. Carrier index.json URLs embedded in PUF xlsx.
carriers.notes: All FFE state carriers come from the single federal MR-PUF file. Per-carrier drugs fetched via index.json → drugs.json chain.
carriers.fetch_notes: Fetched via CMS MR-PUF → carrier index.json → drugs.json chain
